title: Write a structured failure postmortem after a task failure
prompt: A deployment failed because the Alembic migration in task TASK-088 added a NOT NULL column without a default, causing a psycopg2 IntegrityError in production. Write a structured failure postmortem to the failure index with: symptoms, root cause, fix applied, and a prevention pattern for future migrations.

rubric.notes: Should use failure_index.py write command. Output should include all four required fields: symptoms, root_cause, fix_applied, prevention_pattern.
